title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, discusses the evolution from manual coding to autonomous AI agents managing software engineering. He cites data showing 30% of Cursor's PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in one year, and agents successfully built a browser in a week without human intervention.
